## Summary

<!-- What this PR does, in 1-3 sentences. Link the issue it closes: "Closes #NN". -->

## Type

<!-- Pick one: -->
- [ ] Scene / engine change
- [ ] Data model change (claim, source, passage, scene, location)
- [ ] Docs / ADR / architecture
- [ ] Tooling / CI / test infrastructure
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] I filed an issue first and got maintainer ack (or this is a trivial doc / typo fix).
- [ ] `npm run verify` is green locally.
- [ ] New visible elements have a claim card with a confidence tier.
- [ ] New sources are added as source-cards under `sources/source-cards/`.
- [ ] Relevant `docs/` (progress, run-log, next-run, asset-roadmap) are updated.
- [ ] No ESV excerpt policy violations.

## Reviewer notes

<!-- Anything the reviewer should focus on. Screenshots, before/after, decision rationale. -->
